name: QUOTEMEDIA INC
summary: QuoteMedia, Inc. (OTCQB: QMCI) is a financial data and software solutions provider offering streaming market data feeds, interactive web content, data APIs, portfolio management systems, news feeds, and investor relations solutions. Serving online brokerages, banks, clearing firms, media portals, and public corporations, the company delivers services via SaaS models including its QMod widget library, Quotestream desktop/mobile/web apps, and Quotestream Professional, covering over 70 exchanges worldwide.

products.name: Quotestream Desktop and Mobile
products.description: Real-time tick-by-tick streaming market quotes, charting, and research for non-professional users on desktop and mobile platforms.

products.name: Quotestream Web
products.description: HTML5 browser-based streaming portfolio management solution requiring no downloads or installations.

products.name: Quotestream Professional
products.description: Advanced portfolio management system targeted at professional users.

products.name: Quotestream Connect
products.description: Hybrid data feed service delivering real-time data to individual users to power third-party applications while retaining Vendor of Record status.

products.name: QMod
products.description: Proprietary JavaScript widget library for secure, SEO-friendly, mobile-ready market data delivery via JSON back-ends.

products.name: Data Feed Services
products.description: Low-latency tick-by-tick enterprise streaming market data feeds covering equities, options, futures, commodities, currencies, and indices across 70+ exchanges.

products.name: Interactive Content and Data APIs
products.description: Suite of customizable financial widgets including quote modules, charts, screeners, news, watch lists, and investor relations solutions.

products.name: Stock Screeners
products.description: Tool allowing users to filter stocks by sector, price, market cap, EPS, P/E ratio, and other criteria.

products.name: Fund Screeners
products.description: Tool to filter US and Canadian mutual funds by type, performance, and fee structure.

products.name: Wallboards
products.description: Real-time market data and news display solution for trade floors, classrooms, and wall displays.

products.name: Finance Calculators
products.description: Web-based calculators including bond yield, loan payment, mortgage, currency converter, and investment tools.

products.name: Investor Relations Solutions
products.description: Turnkey self-updating investor relations provisioning for corporate websites including quotes, charts, and news.
